ddls:
CREATE TABLE "size_categories" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size category */,
  "size_label" TEXT /* Label for the size category (e.g., XS, S, M, L, XL) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the size category */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the size category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the size category was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement type */,
  "measurement_type" TEXT /* Type of measurement (e.g., Height, Weight, Chest Girth, Waist Girth) */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement (e.g., inches, pounds) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the measurement type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the measurement type was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_measurements" (
  "size_measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size measurement entry */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size category */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the measurement type */,
  "min_value" REAL /* Minimum measurement value */,
  "max_value" REAL /* Maximum measurement value */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the size measurement entry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the size measurement entry was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_measurements_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES size_categories ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_measurements_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES measurements ("measurement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory entry */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size category */,
  "product_code" TEXT /* Unique product code for the clothing item */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "product_description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item available in inventory */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the supplier of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_product_code FOREIGN KEY ("product_code") REFERENCES products ("product_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES size_categories ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "product_code" TEXT /* Product code of the clothing item being reviewed */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the customer providing feedback */,
  "product_size" TEXT /* Size of the product being reviewed */,
  "fit_rating" INTEGER /* Rating of the fit on a scale of 1-5 */,
  "product_fit" TEXT /* Fit rating description (e.g., Too Small, Perfect, Too Large) */,
  "comfort_rating" INTEGER /* Rating of the comfort on a scale of 1-5 */,
  "product_comfort" TEXT /* Comfort rating description (e.g., Uncomfortable, Neutral, Comfortable) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Additional comments provided by the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_feedback_product_code FOREIGN KEY ("product_code") REFERENCES products ("product_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_code" TEXT /* Unique product code */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the clothing product */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the product (e.g., shirts, pants) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "product_type" TEXT /* Type of product (e.g., top, bottom, dress) */,
  "materials" TEXT /* Materials used to make the product */,
  "colors" TEXT /* Available colors for the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "designers" (
  "designer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each designer */,
  "designer_name" TEXT /* Name of the designer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the designer */,
  "experience" TEXT /* Experience level of the designer (e.g., junior, senior) */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Specialization of the designer (e.g., menswear, womenswear) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("designer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "designers_products" (
  "designer_product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each designer-product relationship */,
  "designer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the designer */,
  "product_code" TEXT /* Reference to the product code */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the designer in the product design process (e.g., lead designer, assistant designer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("designer_product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_designers_products_designer_id FOREIGN KEY ("designer_id") REFERENCES designers ("designer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_designers_products_product_code FOREIGN KEY ("product_code") REFERENCES products ("product_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend entry */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size category */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the measurement type */,
  "trend_value" REAL /* Value indicating the trend (e.g., average size over time) */,
  "recorded_date" TEXT /* Date when the trend data was recorded */,
  "trend_type" TEXT /* Type of trend (e.g., seasonal, yearly) */,
  "trend_description" TEXT /* Description of the trend */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_trends_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES size_categories ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_trends_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES measurements ("measurement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., designer, production manager) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user (e.g., design, production) */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user accessing the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the access occurred */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Level of access (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "access_result" TEXT /* Result of the access attempt (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the supplier */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the supplier */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the supplier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)
